text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a full year of strength-centered training and
bulking up, and Hishi Akebono has unlocked her
massive frame's full potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to get serious. Word has it that Biko
Pegasus will run in the Sprinters S. Our next race
is set.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The public seems more interested in their
mismatched height difference than the race itself,
but that doesn't bother Hishi Akebono at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's confident that anyone who watches the race
will be sucked into the excitement of it all and
learn to love the race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our days preparing for the Sprinters S. and her
battle against her all-important rival, Biko
Pegasus, are starting in earnest!
